column11: Inverse of coefficient of variation of link-level travel times; Tr = 1/(1 + CV) where CV = σ/µ of travel times; higher = more reliable; lower reliability → higher susceptibility to disruption

column11: Binary flag indicating whether a scenario's impact category must be escalated by 1 due to disproportionate impact on vulnerable groups (equity ratio requity > 1.5 threshold); post-triangulation adjustment
column19: D3.2 requity calculation; equity ratio per scenario
